description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a prominent red gable roof and white exterior walls. The structure features a central entrance flanked by large windows, and the roof has two distinct gabled peaks. The property is surrounded by a low white fence and is set on a circular grassy plot with a paved driveway leading to the front. The building is accompanied by several adjacent structures, likely representing neighboring houses or garages, rendered in a simplified white form. Sparse landscaping with a few small trees is visible around the main building, enhancing its suburban character.
description: A single-story bungalow with a red gable roof, white walls, large front windows, and a central entrance, set on a grassy plot with a driveway and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: The bungalow is seen from the side, showing the red gable roof, white walls, and the driveway leading up to the property.
description_view_1: The front of the bungalow is visible, highlighting the central entrance, large front windows, and the two gabled roof peaks.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the bungalow are shown, with the red roof and white walls, as well as the surrounding fence and adjacent structures.
description_view_3: A direct view of the front facade, emphasizing the entrance, symmetrical windows, and the driveway leading up to the house.
